title: Project Report: CodeQuest Study Report Tutor — Generative AI Engineer
author: Gagan Pasupuleti
summary: RAG over study report JSON/Markdown; structured prompts return chapter summaries and quiz questions.
source_file: CodeQuest project specification (official docs + industry patterns)

chapters.title: Project Overview
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Project Overview** *(Level: Intermediate)*

**CodeQuest Study Report Tutor** is a intermediate-level end-to-end project for Generative AI Engineer. Duration: 3–4 weeks. RAG over study report JSON/Markdown; structured prompts return chapter summaries and quiz questions. Tools: LangChain, FastAPI, OpenAI, Chroma.

Code Reference:
```text
Objective: Index Role_Reports catalog and chapters
Objective: Structured JSON output for quizzes
Objective: Rate limiting and cost tracking
Objective: Evaluation set with 20 benchmark questions
```
What it shows: Lists measurable outcomes before you start building.

### What it actually is
A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.

### When to use it
At project kickoff.

### Where to use it
Generative AI Engineer portfolios and CodeQuest project submissions.

### Real use example
A candidate lists this project on a Generative AI Engineer resume with a demo link.
key_takeaways: A project overview defines scope, tools, and success criteria.
A candidate lists this project on a Generative AI Engineer resume with a demo link.

chapters.title: Phase: Index
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Phase: Index** *(Level: Intermediate)*

Load report corpus. Complete these tasks: JSON + MD parsers; Metadata filters. Deliverable for this phase: Vector index.

Code Reference:
```text
- [ ] JSON + MD parsers
- [ ] Metadata filters
```
What it shows: Checklist format helps track phase completion.

### What it actually is
Phase Index is one step in the full project lifecycle.

### Where to use it

### Real use example

chapters.title: Final Deliverables and Review
chapters.content:
**Chapter focus: Final Deliverables and Review** *(Level: Intermediate)*

Submit all final deliverables: Tutor API; Eval report; Prompt library doc; Demo video. Skills demonstrated: RAG, Prompt engineering, Evaluation. Prepare a 5-minute walkthrough video and README for CodeQuest teacher marking.

Code Reference:
```text
Deliverable: Tutor API
Deliverable: Eval report
Deliverable: Prompt library doc
Deliverable: Demo video
```
What it shows: Final checklist ensures nothing is missing at submission.

### What it actually is
Deliverable review confirms end-to-end project completion.

### When to use it
Before deadline and teacher review.

### Where to use it
CodeQuest project gallery and interviews.

### Real use example
A student submits Tutor API and passes the rubric.
